data.content: Implementation review approved: settings are reorganized into tabs (Repos/Agents/Dispatch/Defaults) in settings-sheet and section UIs use reduced typography classes (primarily text-xs/text-[11px]) to reduce clutter. Invariants: none declared for this knot. Validation run in workspace: bun install --frozen-lockfile passed; bunx tsc --noEmit passed; lint/test/build currently fail due broader existing workspace baseline issues and unrelated regressions.
